title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: sos bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for sos is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The sos package contains a set of utilities that gather information from system hardware, logs, and configuration files. The information can then be used for diagnostic purposes and debugging.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): The description section of the "sos" man page contains word "sos report" twice (JIRA:RHEL-101564)  [RFE] Identify if a system is based in PAYG or BYOS model in Azure (JIRA:RHEL-102835)  Some proxy env vars are not getting obfuscated when running --all-logs (JIRA:RHEL-103749)  [RFE] [kdump] Capture the output of kdumpctl status and kdumpctl estimate (JIRA:RHEL-104041)  Obfuscate proxy information in insights plugin (JIRA:RHEL-104245)  RFE: Include /etc/services File in sosreport Output (JIRA:RHEL-105407)  [RFE] Capture the actual disk usage (not just the logical size) of the sparse file - '/var/log/lastlog' in the sosreport. (JIRA:RHEL-107275)  [ibm_support] RFE: add mdadm as a dependency for the sos package (JIRA:RHEL-107282)  sosreport gather password in RHEL 9.4 on EDPM nodes (JIRA:RHEL-109421)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.0 [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110499)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.0 [rhel-9.2.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110500)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.0 [rhel-9.4.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110501)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.0 [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110502)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.0 [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110504)  [RFE] Obfuscating the files in the same archive concurrently when runs 'sosreport --clean' (JIRA:RHEL-2347)  Parallel run of sos report obfuscation produces multiple entries for same key (JIRA:RHEL-64756)  Request to add CVE information to sosreport collection (JIRA:RHEL-94859)  SoS produces a backtrace if user cancels upload with control+c (JIRA:RHEL-94968)  SoS Upload asks for case-id twice if the user pressed enter when asked the first time (JIRA:RHEL-95366)  [regression] sos report stops workig in a toolbox container (JIRA:RHEL-112413)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server - AUS
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server for Power LE - Update Services for SAP Solutions
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems - Extended Update Support
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian - Extended Update Support
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64 - 4 years of updates
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 - 4 years of updates 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64 - Extended Update Support
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 - Extended Update Support 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems - 4 years of updates
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 - Update Services for SAP Solutions 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian - 4 years of support
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: [ibm_support] RFE: add mdadm as a dependency for the sos package
[RFE] Obfuscating the files in the same archive concurrently when runs 'sosreport --clean'
[regression] sos report stops workig in a toolbox container

full_text:
An update for sos is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The sos package contains a set of utilities that gather information from system hardware, logs, and configuration files. The information can then be used for diagnostic purposes and debugging.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): The description section of the "sos" man page contains word "sos report" twice (JIRA:RHEL-101564)  [RFE] Identify if a system is based in PAYG or BYOS model in Azure (JIRA:RHEL-102835)  Some proxy env vars are not getting obfuscated when running --all-logs (JIRA:RHEL-103749)  [RFE] [kdump] Capture the output of kdumpctl status and kdumpctl estimate (JIRA:RHEL-104041)  Obfuscate proxy information in insights plugin (JIRA:RHEL-104245)  RFE: Include /etc/services File in sosreport Output (JIRA:RHEL-105407)  [RFE] Capture the actual disk usage (not just the logical size) of the sparse file - '/var/log/lastlog' in the sosreport. (JIRA:RHEL-107275)  [ibm_support] RFE: add mdadm as a dependency for the sos package (JIRA:RHEL-107282)  sosreport gather password in RHEL 9.4 on EDPM nodes (JIRA:RHEL-109421)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.0 [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110499)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.0 [rhel-9.2.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110500)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.0 [rhel-9.4.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110501)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.0 [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110502)  [rebase] rebase sos to 4.10.0 [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110504)  [RFE] Obfuscating the files in the same archive concurrently when runs 'sosreport --clean' (JIRA:RHEL-2347)  Parallel run of sos report obfuscation produces multiple entries for same key (JIRA:RHEL-64756)  Request to add CVE information to sosreport collection (JIRA:RHEL-94859)  SoS produces a backtrace if user cancels upload with control+c (JIRA:RHEL-94968)  SoS Upload asks for case-id twice if the user pressed enter when asked the first time (JIRA:RHEL-95366)  [regression] sos report stops workig in a toolbox container (JIRA:RHEL-112413)
